instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `for-i-from-to` that iterates a user-named variable from start through end inclusive. The end expression must be evaluated only once and stashed in a hidden binding that the body cannot shadow.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 10))
            (DO ((I 0 (1+ I))) ((> I #:G1)) (PRINT I)))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 10))
            (DO ((I 0 (1+ I))) ((> I #:G112)) (PRINT I)))

--- stderr ---
